notes.defaultOpenClawCaseIds: Frozen P2 CLI detection smoke path. These cases should be safe to run through OpenClaw CLI by default.
notes.openClawCandidateCaseIds: A-line maintained candidate set for future OpenClaw CLI expansion after B line confirms tool coverage.
notes.fallbackAdapterCaseIds: Default mock/http_sample regression path when no caseIds are provided.
notes.fallbackOnlyCaseIds: Cases that may require internal fixture behavior or unsupported tools in the current OpenClaw realtime MCP surface.
